name: bind_sql_generation
objective: Generate one executable Oracle SQL statement that returns real bind candidate rows for the target query.
rules: Return only one executable SELECT statement.
Use real table data rather than synthetic literals.
Each output column alias must exactly match the bind parameter name.
Do not emit MyBatis tags, placeholders, markdown, comments, JSON, or multiple statements.
Limit output to a small set of distinct bind cases.
user_instruction: Generate one executable Oracle SQL statement only.
